title: Develop a Site Reliability Engineering (SRE) strategy
summary: Sustainably achieve the appropriate level of reliability in your systems, services, and products and prepare for Exam AZ-400: Designing and Implementing Microsoft DevOps Solutions.

sections.title: Develop a Site Reliability Engineering (SRE) strategy
sections.summary: Sustainably achieve the appropriate level of reliability in your systems, services, and products and prepare for Exam AZ-400: Designing and Implementing Microsoft DevOps Solutions.

lessons.title: Introduction to Site Reliability Engineering (SRE)
lessons.content_md:
Learn about SRE, an engineering discipline that helps you sustainably achieve the appropriate level of reliability in your systems, services, and products.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/intro-to-site-reliability-engineering/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Manage site reliability
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to manage site reliability.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/manage-site-reliability/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Monitor your Azure virtual machines with Azure Monitor
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to monitor your Azure VMs by using Azure Monitor to collect and analyze VM host and client metrics and logs.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/monitor-azure-vm-using-diagnostic-data/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Monitor your Azure virtual machines with Azure Monitor

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Develop a Site Reliability Engineering (SRE) strategy
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Develop a Site Reliability Engineering (SRE) strategy**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
